channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Power of APIs in the Financial Sector: Revolutionizing Innovation and Efficiency
item.description: The finance sector is leading from the front with the rollout of open banking, streamlining credit scoring, anti-money laundering techniques, real-time trading, and customer experience innovation. APIs are driving this change, facilitating secure data exchange and enabling new services and business cases.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Automakers Accused of Tracking and Selling Driving Data
item.description: General Motors and other automakers accused of selling driving data to insurance companies without proper consent
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
